tools.name: plaid.transferRepaymentList
tools.description: The `/transfer/repayment/list` endpoint fetches repayments matching the given filters. Repayments are returned in reverse-chronological order (most recent first) starting at the given `start_time`.

tools.name: plaid.transferRepaymentReturnList
tools.description: The `/transfer/repayment/return/list` endpoint retrieves the set of returns that were batched together into the specified repayment. The sum of amounts of returns retrieved by this request equals the amount of the repayment.

tools.name: plaid.transferSweepGet
tools.description: The `/transfer/sweep/get` endpoint fetches a sweep corresponding to the given `sweep_id`.

tools.name: plaid.transferSweepList
tools.description: The `/transfer/sweep/list` endpoint fetches sweeps matching the given filters.

tools.name: plaid.userCreate
tools.description:
This endpoint should be called for each of your end users before they begin a Plaid income flow. This provides you a single token to access all income data associated with the user. You should only create one per end user.

If you call the endpoint multiple times with the same `client_user_id`, the first creation call will succeed and the rest will fail with an error message indicating that the user has been created for the given `client_user_id`.

Ensure that you store the `user_token` along with your user's identifier in your database, as it is not possible to retrieve a previously created `user_token`.

tools.name: plaid.walletCreate
tools.description: Create an e-wallet. The response is the newly created e-wallet object.

tools.name: plaid.walletGet
tools.description: Fetch an e-wallet. The response includes the current balance.

tools.name: plaid.walletList
tools.description: This endpoint lists all e-wallets in descending order of creation.

tools.name: plaid.walletTransactionExecute
tools.description:
Execute a transaction using the specified e-wallet.
Specify the e-wallet to debit from, the counterparty to credit to, the idempotency key to prevent duplicate transactions, the amount and reference for the transaction.
Transactions will settle in seconds to several days, depending on the underlying payment rail.

tools.name: plaid.walletTransactionGet
tools.description: Fetch a specific e-wallet transaction

tools.name: plaid.walletTransactionList
tools.description: This endpoint lists the latest transactions of the specified e-wallet. Transactions are returned in descending order by the `created_at` time.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningEntityCreate
tools.description: Create a new entity watchlist screening to check your customer against watchlists defined in the associated entity watchlist program. If your associated program has ongoing screening enabled, this is the profile information that will be used to monitor your customer over time.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningEntityGet
tools.description: Retrieve an entity watchlist screening.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningEntityHistoryList
tools.description: List all changes to the entity watchlist screening in reverse-chronological order. If the watchlist screening has not been edited, no history will be returned.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningEntityHitList
tools.description: List all hits for the entity watchlist screening.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningEntityList
tools.description: List all entity screenings.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningEntityProgramGet
tools.description: Get an entity watchlist screening program

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningEntityProgramList
tools.description: List all entity watchlist screening programs

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningEntityReviewCreate
tools.description: Create a review for an entity watchlist screening. Reviews are compliance reports created by users in your organization regarding the relevance of potential hits found by Plaid.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningEntityReviewList
tools.description: List all reviews for a particular entity watchlist screening. Reviews are compliance reports created by users in your organization regarding the relevance of potential hits found by Plaid.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningEntityUpdate
tools.description: Update an entity watchlist screening.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningIndividualCreate
tools.description: Create a new Watchlist Screening to check your customer against watchlists defined in the associated Watchlist Program. If your associated program has ongoing screening enabled, this is the profile information that will be used to monitor your customer over time.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningIndividualGet
tools.description: Retrieve a previously created individual watchlist screening

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningIndividualHistoryList
tools.description: List all changes to the individual watchlist screening in reverse-chronological order. If the watchlist screening has not been edited, no history will be returned.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningIndividualHitList
tools.description: List all hits found by Plaid for a particular individual watchlist screening.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningIndividualList
tools.description: List previously created watchlist screenings for individuals

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningIndividualProgramGet
tools.description: Get an individual watchlist screening program

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningIndividualProgramList
tools.description: List all individual watchlist screening programs

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningIndividualReviewCreate
tools.description: Create a review for the individual watchlist screening. Reviews are compliance reports created by users in your organization regarding the relevance of potential hits found by Plaid.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningIndividualReviewList
tools.description: List all reviews for the individual watchlist screening.

tools.name: plaid.watchlistScreeningIndividualUpdate
tools.description: Update a specific individual watchlist screening. This endpoint can be used to add additional customer information, correct outdated information, add a reference id, assign the individual to a reviewer, and update which program it is associated with. Please note that you may not update `search_terms` and `status` at the same time since editing `search_terms` may trigger an automatic `status` change.

tools.name: plaid.webhookVerificationKeyGet
tools.description:
Plaid signs all outgoing webhooks and provides JSON Web Tokens (JWTs) so that you can verify the authenticity of any incoming webhooks to your application. A message signature is included in the `Plaid-Verification` header.

The `/webhook_verification_key/get` endpoint provides a JSON Web Key (JWK) that can be used to verify a JWT.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
